# Engineering Guidelines 2024

Internal reference for the engineering organization. Restricted to engineering staff.

## Code Review Standards

All pull requests must receive at least two approvals from senior engineers before merge.

## On-Call Responsibilities

On-call engineers are expected to respond to P1 incidents within 15 minutes.

## Security Policy

Never commit secrets or credentials to version control. Use the secrets manager.

_Sensitivity: L1 (Internal). Allowed groups: eng:engineering_
